[ ](https://news.ycombinator.com)**[Hacker News](https://news.ycombinator.com/news)** [new](https://news.ycombinator.com/newest) | [past](https://news.ycombinator.com/front) | [comments](https://news.ycombinator.com/newcomments) | [ask](https://news.ycombinator.com/ask) | [show](https://news.ycombinator.com/show) | [jobs](https://news.ycombinator.com/jobs) The linked report argues that distributed teams sustain higher throughput when asynchronous written communication replaces synchronous status meetings.
